title: Dayr as Sanqūrīyah Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Dayr as Sanqūrīyah with a Z-Score of +6.49. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Dayr as Sanqūrīyah is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 21.7 GG. 
 The low humidity of 15% and moderate wind speed of 14.9 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high, posing a threat to the population.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to mitigate the heat wave's impact on the population and infrastructure.
